---
title: ""
engine: knitr
format:
  html:
    body-classes: front-page
---

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 1.5em;">
  <img src="assets/images/cover/clinical-medical-data-systems-cover.png" width="75%" />
</div>

<div style="text-align: center; font-style: normal; margin-top: 1em;">
Clinical Medical Data Systems: Updated {{< meta date >}}
</div>
